input.command: curl -s "https://api.relay.link/chains" | python3 -c "import sys, json; chains = json.load(sys.stdin)['chains']; [print(f\"{c['displayName']} (id: {c['id']}, vmType: {c.get('vmType', 'evm')})\") for c in chains if c.get('vmType') in ['svm', 'bvm', 'tvm']]"
